description:
| Class Code | Class Name | Red | Green | Blue |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | No fallow land | 240 | 240 | 240 |
| 40 | 40 days | 215 | 25 | 28 |
| 41-948 | 41-948 days | Colour shades in between | | |
This table defines the colour palette for the Copernicus Cropland Fallow Land Duration (CPFLD) layer, mapping specific fallow land duration classes to RGB colour values. Class 0, representing "No fallow land", is assigned light grey (RGB 240, 240, 240). Class 40, representing "40 days" of fallow land, is assigned a bright red colour (RGB 215, 25, 28). For the range of "41-948 days" of fallow land, the table indicates a gradient of colour shades would be used in between the specified colours.
